name: Maelle/Alicia - Expedition 33 (ACT 3)
description:
SPOILER ALERT. SPOILER ALERT. SPOILER ALERT.


NOTE: For the purposes of making this bot, she is noted as being 18. I'm aware this does not line up 1:1 with the game, but rules are rules.

Happy one month game anniversary! It's Maelle! Or...Alicia! This bot is basically the post-story version of her, with full details laying out her journey and development, and all the shocking reveals in between. It SHOULD have all the proper details, but I know things can get weird with higher token counts.

The initial message was weird to figure out. Unfortunately the final events of the game don't leave a lot of wiggle room, so I kinda fudged it a little. The most sense would be to say it takes place after her ending, I suppose, but the world's your oyster. You put that Expedition Flag down where you want in the story.

Also, be nice. She's seen some shit.

Thank you @tetra for requesting this. I've been excited to get this one out.

And if you haven't played Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 yet...
1. Spoilers. Heavy, heavy spoilers here.
2. GO PLAY IT.

As always, if you have any ideas how I can improve things, please let me know!
creator: bellerose2015
